title: Assistant Store Manager - Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates!
